summary: Excellent front‑of‑board recording with gorgeous fidelity; the show is a cool performance.
review: The reviewer praises this tape as an outstanding front‑of‑house (FOB) capture, noting its very good spread and gorgeous fidelity. The concert itself is described as “quite cool,” though no specific songs or moments are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 4‑star review highlights superb recording quality and a generally enjoyable show, yielding an overall rating of about 4 stars with moderate confidence due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: FOB source noted; very good spread and gorgeous fidelity reported, indicating a clear and balanced mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; reviewer simply calls the show "quite cool."
